name: Active User Base
description: Refers to the number of monthly active users on the platform. A larger user base increases the likelihood of connecting with more friends.
sources: AgileTech Vietnam, AppFigures, Company Reports, Doofinder, SOAX, Sensor Tower, Statista

name: Active Users
description: Number of active users on the platform; a higher number suggests a larger pool of friends to connect with.
sources: AgileTech Vietnam, Buffer, Exploding Topics, SOAX, Various sources like Statista, and news articles, company reports

name: Communication Features
description: The variety of communication methods available, such as text messaging, voice calls, video calls, and group chats.
sources: AgileTech Vietnam, App Store, App Store descriptions, Croma Unboxed, Expert reviews, Firefly, Firefly - Sunrise Medical, Google Play Store, Google Play Store descriptions, Lake Travis Community Library, Mashable, Oberlo, Sterling College, Sunday Edit, Wise

name: Content Sharing Options
description: Variety and ease of sharing different types of content (photos, videos, links, music) influencing user engagement.
sources: AgileTech Vietnam, Mashable, Practical Ecommerce, St Christopher's Inns, Symptoms of Living

name: Group Communication
description: Features that facilitate group chats and calls, making it easier to connect with multiple friends simultaneously.
sources: App specifications, Carlcare, Sterling College, Wise, Yabb Messenger, user reviews

name: Group Interaction
description: Features that facilitate group communication and activities, such as group chats, shared calendars, and collaborative games.  Essential for staying connected with multiple friends at once.

name: Group Interaction Capabilities
description: Features that facilitate group communication and activities (e.g., group chats, shared calendars, collaborative playlists).
sources: App reviews, Feature lists, Firefly - Sunrise Medical, St Christopher's Inns, Wise

name: Integration with Other Platforms
description: Ability to connect and share content with other social media platforms and services.

name: Multimedia Sharing
description: Ease and variety of sharing multimedia content like photos, videos, and audio messages.
sources: App reviews, Firefly, The Sociable, Yabb Messenger, user feedback

name: Privacy and Security
description: Level of encryption and privacy settings available.
sources: Carlcare, Croma Unboxed, Sterling College, Zapier

name: Privacy Controls
description: Options for managing privacy settings and content visibility, ensuring user comfort and safety.
sources: App description, App settings, Monica, Privacy policy, SOAX, Symptoms of Living

name: Real-time Updates
description: Ability to provide real-time updates on friends' activities and availability, facilitating spontaneous interactions.
sources: App features, Elite Daily, Howbout, Symptoms of Living, user reviews

name: Unique Features
description: Distinctive functionalities like built-in games, location sharing, or audio-first communication that set the app apart.
sources: Beyond Instagram & Snapchat, ElderHub, Hootsuite Blog, MakeUseOf, Mashable, Medicinal Media, Practical Ecommerce, St Christopher's Inns, Symptoms of Living, The Sociable

name: User Base
description: Number of active users on the platform.
sources: AgileTech Vietnam, Hootsuite Blog, Oberlo, Sensor Tower
